title: ReasoningBank: Scaling Agent Self-Evolving with Reasoning Memory

defines.name: ReasoningBank
defines.definition: A memory framework that distills generalizable reasoning strategies from an agent’s self-judged successful and failed experiences and retrieves them to guide future interactions.

defines.name: MaTTS
defines.definition: Memory-aware test-time scaling that increases an agent’s interaction experience to accelerate and diversify memory formation.

uses: integrating new learnings back into memory
problem: Existing agent memory methods mainly store raw trajectories or successful routines, so agents do not effectively learn from accumulated experience or self-improve over time.
